{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/30854794?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/YLChen-007", "id": 30854794, "login": "YLChen-007", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjMwODU0Nzk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/YLChen-007", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:L/SI:L/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "## Impact
The `ExecuteWorkflow` node's `localFile` source option read workflow files from disk without applying checks enforced by other file-reading nodes. An authenticated user with permission to create or modify workflows could supply an arbitrary file path via the REST API, bypassing the `N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO` restriction. This allowed the attacker to determine whether arbitrary files exist on the server host. Where the targeted path contained a valid workflow JSON file, the file could additionally be loaded and executed, potentially triggering actions on downstream systems connected to that workflow.

The `localFile` source option is hidden from the n8n UI since v1.2 but remains accessible via the REST API.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n version 2.20.0 or 2.19.3. Users should upgrade to this version or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict workflow creation and editing permissions to fully trusted users only.
- Restrict network access to the n8n REST API to trusted users only.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-19T15:55:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-19T15:55:43Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Legacy ExecuteWorkflow Node Bypassed File Path Restrictions", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-19T15:55:44Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2vx9-7wpg-88jq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.19.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.19.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Legacy ExecuteWorkflow Node Bypassed File Path Restrictions
